sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75418" key="o)rukth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρυκ-τήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n75418.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">miner,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zeno Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.30</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
